description: A security operator watching the CCTV monitors notices an individual leaving a backpack unattended in a high-traffic area.

nodes.task_description: Identify the location of the unattended bag on the CCTV feed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent notes the location (e.g., near the main escalator).

nodes.task_description: Continue to monitor the bag and the surrounding area for the owner to return.

expected_outcome.value: Agent observes the bag for several minutes, and no one returns.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a security guard to the location to investigate the package.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a guard to the location.

nodes.task_description: If the package is deemed suspicious, the on-site guard will escalate to the bomb squad or local police as per protocol.

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs the incident and stands by to assist with further emergency protocols if needed.
